titleStmt.title: SII 37.247: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 247. (A.R. No. B 353 of 1940-41.) Nemaḷḷadinne, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab (third) set up infront of the Vishṇu temple.
This is dated Śaka 1533, Virōdhikṛit, Māgha ba. 10, Saturday, corresponding to 1612 A.D., February.

It registers a grant of land by Vidvan mahājanas of the village Nēmalidinne and also Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jillēḷḷa Raṅgapatirājayyadēva-Mahārāju to the artisan Tirumalaya for his having made a sculpture of god Nāgavuḷa Chennakēśava.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁ
bulu 1533 Agunēṭi virōdhikṛtu saṁvatsara mā
gha ba 10 śe śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
śrī vīraveṁkaṭapatirāya mahārāyulugā
ru caṁdragiri paṭṭaṇamaṁdu vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhuḍai
pṛthivi sāmrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍaṁggānu śrīmadhyajanayājana A
yana Adhyāpaka dānadānapratigraha ṣaṭkarma niratulaina namalidinna A
grahārāna Aśēṣa vi¨rdvamahājanālunu śrī¨rmamahāma
ṁḍalēśvara jilleḷaraṁggapati rājayyadēvamahārājulugāru
paṁṭa Ayyagāri battu
battuni putruḍu tirumalayyaku yicina dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ . ne
milidina grāmāna nagavula ceṁnnakēśvaruni nūtana vigrahaṁ sēsina
nimittaṁ rēgaṭimula grāmāniki paḍamara cēnu Āmu tū¨rpu
nīku sa¨rvamānyaṁgā naḍapagalavāraṁ nīputra
pavutra pāraṁparyamataṁ Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigānu
[Anubha]viṁcuka sukhāna bratikēdi
yavaru ganuka nānu
lanu vāraṇāsilōnu
brāhmani
ṁ puṁṇyaṁ
The rest of the inscription is broken and lost.
Digital edition of SII 37.247 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
